# Hyderabad Kingsmen — full corpus

> Independent coverage of the Hyderabad Kingsmen — the Hyderabad, Sindh-based franchise that debuted in the Pakistan Super League (PSL) in 2026 and reached the final in their first season. Original analysis, player profiles, and venue guides, in English and Urdu.

Site: https://hyderabadkingsmen.com
Generated: see /sitemap.xml for live timestamps

NOTE: This file is regenerated by the aeo_generator.py agent on every site rebuild. The version committed here is the initial launch snapshot. The agent will overwrite it with the live post corpus once you wire it into your build pipeline.

---

## From 0-4 to the PSL final: how Hyderabad Kingsmen turned a debut season into a story
URL: https://hyderabadkingsmen.com/posts/kingsmen-psl-2026-final-run/
Published: 2026-06-29
Section: Analysis

The Hyderabad Kingsmen lost their first four matches of PSL 2026 and were widely written off, then won their way through Eliminator 1 against Multan Sultans and the "Niaz Miracle" two-run win against Islamabad United in Eliminator 2 to reach the final against Peshawar Zalmi. This piece traces the tactical shift after the four-game losing streak (Saim Ayub and Sharjeel Khan to open and attack, Marnus Labuschagne to rebuild at three), the playoff run, and the questions that face the franchise heading into PSL 2027.

Also available in Urdu: https://hyderabadkingsmen.com/ur/posts/kingsmen-psl-2026-final-run/

---

## Marnus Labuschagne — the Australian Test batter who captained the Kingsmen to the PSL final
URL: https://hyderabadkingsmen.com/players/marnus-labuschagne/
Published: 2026-06-29
Section: Player Profiles

Marnus Labuschagne is the Australian Test batter who Hyderabad Kingsmen directly-signed as their debut-season captain. His PSL 2026: 360 runs in 13 innings at a strike rate of 134, highest score 71 not out against Karachi Kings. The captaincy and the team's identity took six weeks to settle, then carried the franchise to the final. Profile covers his arrival, the post-four-loss tactical reset, his playoff knocks, and what to watch fo
